note: WebTigers-curated placement. Keyed by the listing file stem <GitHubOrg>_<GitHubRepo>. compile-index.php merges these into index.json: higher `priority` sorts first and `sponsored:true` renders a badge in Tiger's directory. Vendors do NOT edit this file — placement is a transparent, auditable WebTigers commit. `until` (YYYY-MM-DD, optional) expires a sponsorship automatically.
